notes: Scaffolding control (task 0.3). INVARIANT control for the 0.6 regeneration test: a header_template record with no grammar dependency — no magic in its bytes, no pin hash in its manifest stub. Flipping the magic constant must leave this file byte-identical; without that, the regeneration test cannot tell a working rebuild from one that rewrites everything. This record is the invariant for MAGIC flips specifically: the 0.2 pin-scan derives invalidation sets for document pin movements, and the 7.1 freeze re-pins the gate constants themselves, which are inputs to every artifact, so the freeze regenerates the full inventory by its own procedure, outside pin-scan selection.
